title: Crepidifolium akagii
taxonomy: Crepidifolium akagii is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is native to Australia. The classification of Crepidifolium akagii is as follows: kingdom Plantae, phylum Angiosperms, class Magnoliopsida, order Asterales, family Asteraceae, genus Crepidifolium, species C. akagii. This plant is often found in wetland areas. Its classification is closely related to other species within the Asteraceae family.
